message:
fix(membrane): resolve 44 workspace-wide clippy errors blocking CI

Fixes assertions_on_constants (22), needless_range_loop (14),
needless_borrow (3), useless_vec (1), and dangling pointer (1)
warnings across 9 files in frankenlibc-membrane.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
